name: [iam-jit] Unusual high-risk action attempted
message:
An iam-jit Bounce session attempted an action on the high-risk watchlist in the last 10 minutes.

The `unusual_high_risk_action` rule (alert pattern `high-risk-action-denied`) fires when a deny landed on an action from the configured high-risk set — IAM creation primitives, KMS Decrypt, SecretsManager Get*, audit-infra destruction. A deny is a 'look at what was tried' signal; in transparent mode the deny was advisory (the call did succeed upstream).

Review the session's full event stream before drawing conclusions; benign agents do occasionally try high-risk reads.

@your-team-here
